_comment: TinderGPT pipeline extensions. Edit via panel Prompts tab or directly.

step1_conditions._comment: Conditions to complete step1. All must be met to move to step2.

custom_tags._comment: Add custom tags here. Each tag needs a matching rule in rules_db.sqlite.

pre_writer_instructions._comment: Extra instructions injected into every Writer call.

pre_send_filter._comment: Strip these patterns from opener before sending.

custom_instructions._comment: Extra instructions appended to opener prompt.
